stories.headline: Intel Q1 2026 Earnings Smash Estimates as AI Data Center Revenue Hits $5.1 Billion
stories.key_takeaway: Intel posted $13.6 billion in Q1 revenue, beating expectations by over $1 billion, as its AI data center unit surged 22% to $5.1 billion.

pull_quote.text: Our Q1 results demonstrate the strength of our product portfolio and the accelerating demand for AI infrastructure across the enterprise.

stories.article_excerpt: Intel delivered a blockbuster first quarter, posting $13.6 billion in revenue that handily beat Wall Street expectations...

stories.headline: Cognition AI in Talks to Raise at $25 Billion Valuation as AI Coding Wars Intensify
stories.key_takeaway: Cognition AI, maker of the Devin autonomous coding agent, is in talks to raise at a $25 billion valuation, more than doubling from $10.2 billion.

pull_quote.text: We believe Devin represents the future of software development.

stories.article_excerpt: Cognition AI, the startup behind the autonomous AI software engineer Devin, is in early talks to raise at $25 billion...

stories.headline: Q1 2026 Shatters Global Venture Records at $300 Billion With AI Claiming 80 Percent
stories.key_takeaway: Global venture funding hit $300 billion in Q1 2026, with AI startups capturing $242 billion or 80% of total investment.

pull_quote.text: We have never seen anything like this. The scale of capital deployment into AI is fundamentally reshaping how venture capital works.

stories.article_excerpt: Global venture capital investment shattered all previous records in Q1 2026, with investors pouring $300 billion into...

stories.headline: SK Group Signs AI Infrastructure Deal With Vietnam, Plans 1,500-MW Power Plant
stories.key_takeaway: SK Group signed MOUs with Vietnam to build AI data centers and a 1,500-MW power plant in Nghe An province, marking its first overseas AI full-stack expansion.

pull_quote.text: This partnership represents a new model for how AI infrastructure can be developed in emerging markets.

stories.article_excerpt: South Korea's SK Group signed a series of agreements with Vietnam to build AI infrastructure and a massive 1,500-MW...

stories.headline: Musk's Terafab Taps Intel's 14A Process to Build Next-Generation AI Chips
stories.key_takeaway: Musk's $25 billion Terafab venture will use Intel's most advanced 14A process to manufacture AI chips for Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI.

pull_quote.text: The vertical integration story here is unprecedented. No other company in the world is attempting to design and manufacture AI chips for applications ranging from self-driving cars to orbital computing platforms.

stories.article_excerpt: Elon Musk revealed this week that his Terafab project will use Intel's next-generation 14A manufacturing process to...

stories.headline: OpenAI Ships GPT-5.5 and Workspace Agents in Push Toward Unified AI Platform
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI launched GPT-5.5 alongside workspace agents that can autonomously perform multi-step enterprise workflows across Slack, Gmail, and Salesforce.

pull_quote.text: Instead of asking an AI to help with one task at a time, teams can now deploy agents that handle entire workflows autonomously.

stories.article_excerpt: OpenAI released GPT-5.5 on April 23, positioning its newest model as a major step toward a unified AI platform that...

stories.headline: Google Launches Workspace Intelligence, Wiring Gemini Into Every Productivity App
stories.key_takeaway: Google's Workspace Intelligence creates a unified AI layer across Docs, Sheets, Gmail, and Calendar, claiming 9x faster spreadsheet entry and context-aware assistance.

pull_quote.text: Workspace Intelligence is not just another AI feature bolted onto our apps. It is a fundamental reimagining of how productivity software works.

stories.article_excerpt: Google announced Workspace Intelligence at Cloud Next 2026, a new system that deeply integrates Gemini across Docs...

stories.headline: Google Cloud Confirms Deal to Power Apple Intelligence With Gemini
stories.key_takeaway: Google's Gemini will power Apple Intelligence and an upgraded Siri expected later this year, in a landmark partnership between the two tech giants.

pull_quote.text: We are proud to partner with Apple to bring Gemini's capabilities to hundreds of millions of users worldwide.

stories.article_excerpt: Google Cloud CEO Thomas Kurian confirmed at Cloud Next 2026 that Gemini will underpin Apple Intelligence and power a...

stories.headline: XPENG Unveils IRON Humanoid Robot at Auto China 2026, Targets Mass Production by Year End
stories.key_takeaway: XPENG aims to be the first to achieve large-scale mass production of humanoid robots by end of 2026, powered by its VLA 2.0 model.

pull_quote.text: By the end of 2026, XPENG aims to achieve large-scale mass production of high-level humanoid robots.

stories.article_excerpt: Chinese EV maker XPENG showcased its next-generation IRON humanoid robot at Auto China 2026, announcing plans for...

stories.headline: WHO Releases First Snapshot of AI in Healthcare Across 27 EU Nations
stories.key_takeaway: All 27 EU nations now deploy AI tools in clinical settings, with 63% of healthcare professionals actively using AI, according to the first WHO Europe assessment.

pull_quote.text: AI in healthcare is no longer a future aspiration but a present reality across Europe.

stories.article_excerpt: WHO Europe published a landmark report providing the first comprehensive assessment of AI adoption in healthcare...

stories.headline: Dozens of State AI Bills Hit Deadline Crunch in Arizona, California, and Tennessee
stories.key_takeaway: Multiple state legislatures face session deadlines with dozens of AI bills in play, from children's chatbot safety to healthcare AI regulation.

pull_quote.text: The states are doing what Congress has failed to do, which is actually legislating on AI.
pull_quote.role: Senior Policy Counsel, Center for Democracy and Technology

stories.article_excerpt: State legislatures across the country are racing against session deadlines to pass a wave of AI-related legislation...

stories.headline: Tencent and Alibaba in Talks to Back DeepSeek at Over $20 Billion Valuation
stories.key_takeaway: China's two largest tech companies are reportedly in talks to invest in DeepSeek at over $20 billion, coinciding with the V4 model launch.

pull_quote.text: DeepSeek proved that you do not need tens of billions of dollars to build world-class AI models.
